task_title: Evaluation — run SMA universe sweep and walk-forward at fast=20/slow=50

gates.name: universe gate
gates.criteria: DSR-corrected avg Sharpe > 0 AND PassFraction >= 0.40 (>=40% of instruments with positive Sharpe and >=30 trades)

gates.name: instrument-count gate
gates.criteria: Walk-forward passes >= number of instruments that passed the universe gate (resets to new universe gate count, not prior 12)

marcus.summary: SMA crossover at fast=20/slow=50 fails universe gate. All 15 instruments have InsufficientData=true (trade_count 12-20, minimum required is 30). The ApplyUniverseGate function skips all insufficient-data instruments, leaving 0 sufficient instruments. DSRAverageSharpe is undefined. Gate cannot pass with zero sufficient instruments.
marcus.correlation_note: strategy killed at universe gate — no survivors to correlate

decision_marks_pending: **Decision (sma-crossover fast=20/slow=50 universe gate) — algorithm: rejected** — zero sufficient instruments (all 15 have trade_count < 30 at slower parameters; fast=20/slow=50 generates only 12-20 trades over 6 years on daily bars)
